description: Lemlist is a sales engagement platform for multichannel outreach across email, LinkedIn, and calls with built-in personalization.
tagline: AI sales engagement for converting ideal buyers
overview: Lemlist helps sales teams run personalized, multichannel campaigns across email, LinkedIn, and calls from one platform, with warmups to protect deliverability.
what_is: lemlist is a sales engagement platform that automates outreach across email, LinkedIn, WhatsApp, and calls. It helps teams find qualified leads and reach them with personalized, multichannel sequences from a single tool.

Its strength is running the whole outbound motion in one place, with personalization at scale, automated follow-ups, and built-in warmups that help keep messages out of spam. Setup is quick, so teams often see replies within days.

lemlist connects natively to CRMs like HubSpot and Salesforce and includes lead data and deliverability features. It is focused on outbound sales rather than inbound lead management or broad marketing automation.
